item.title:
RacingTV: Racing TV @RacingTV · 1min "Very exciting - I've never seen him travel better in a race."
Henry Candy on Abernant hero
item.description:
Racing TV @RacingTV · 1min "Very exciting - I've never seen him travel better in a race."
Henry Candy on Abernant hero Run To Freedom & the July Cup awaits 2:08 2 137

item.title:
itvracing: ITV Racing @itvracing · 3min "It's a great tail"
Henry Candy believes "it's wonderful for everyone at home" after 28
item.description:
ITV Racing @itvracing · 3min "It's a great tail"
Henry Candy believes "it's wonderful for everyone at home" after 28-1 Run to Freedom took the Abernant Stakes
#ITVRacing | @NewmarketRace Este video no está disponible en tu ubicación. 2 312

item.title:
RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 5min Joe O’Shea said:
"He has the speed for a Champion Hurdle, but he will definitely be back
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 5min Joe O’Shea said:
"He has the speed for a Champion Hurdle, but he will definitely be back to defend his crowns. He will not be running under rules." Cita Racing Post @RacingPost · 1h Joe O’Shea understandably said he “could do anything” with Barton Snow in light of his Cheltenham Festival winner’s brilliant follow-up victory in the Foxhunters' at Aintree last week
https:// racingpost.com/news/features/ regulars/he-has-the-speed-for-a-champion-hurdle-but-decision-made-on-next-campaign-for-cheltenham-aintree-winner-barton-snow-arCDS7i6FVHT/ … 1 968
